ground_truth.title: Ridge Wallet - Royal Black
ground_truth.main_content:
Ridge Wallet

Our black wallet has an anodized aluminum plating that gives it a scratch-resistant surface, and comes with a dual-track design that expands for 1-12 cards!

WELCOME TO 2.0

Meet the most refined version of the Ridge Wallet and our new industry-leading Built for Life Warranty program.

Our mission is simple: create innovative, functional products designed for life. Ridge 2.0 delivers on that promise with the most refined version of our flagship Ridge Wallet - 10% lighter with improved modularity and design enhancements - and the launch of our industry-leading Built for Life Warranty.

Lighter. Smarter. Still Ridge.

10% Lighter. Weight: Perfected.
Every gram matters in the Ridge Wallet 2.0 - we found the perfect balance.

Improved Modularity
Updated Cash Straps, Money Clips, AirTag Attachments make for a system that evolves in style.

Design Enhancements
Oil-filled logos and new plated Cash Strap provide real estate for designs to make an impact.

DESIGNED FOR EVERYDAY

We rethink what looks good and achieve above-the-rest results. Ridge is for those who want to choose wisely and carry forever, rather than fast fashion, disposable culture and inconsistent values.

Built to endure. For life.

Built for Life Warranty.

Specifications

Material: 6061-T6 aluminum
Weight: 2 oz
Size: 86 x 54 x 6 mm
Holds: 1-12 cards

The Ridge is minimalist without being limiting. It's about carrying less but always having what you need.

THE 21ST CENTURY WALLET

The Ridge is a minimalist, front pocket wallet that's designed to remain as slim as possible. Our patented, dual-track design expands to hold 1-12 cards.

CARRY LESS. LIVE MORE.

The anodized aluminum plating gives you a scratch-resistant surface to stand up against daily wear and tear.

COMPARE YOUR WALLET

Holds 1-12 cards while remaining as slim as possible.
with: dual-track design expands to hold 1-12 cards
anodized aluminum plating gives you a scratch-resistant surface
